Refund Policy

Effective Date: March 30, 2026

1. Digital Products

Due to the nature of digital goods (downloads), all sales are final. Once a digital product has been accessed or downloaded, we cannot offer a refund.

2. Exceptions

Refunds may be granted in the following exceptional circumstances:

  • Technical issues that prevent access to the content, which cannot be resolved by our support team.
  • Accidental duplicate purchases of the same item.

3. Requesting a Refund

To request a refund, please contact us at perfectgiftfind@gmail.com within 14 days of purchase with your transaction details.
